input.command:
git log -1 --stat
echo "---was ben.poersch.portrait.png actually committed? ---"
git log --all --oneline -- public/ben.poersch.portrait.png public/portrait.png
input.description: Check commit history for portrait files

response:
{"stdout":"commit 0eec68e76f77ded94872970e21dd82cae13255d7
Author: DYAI2025 <ben.poersch@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Apr 22 14:10:15 2026 +0200

    feat: restore hero portrait with real PNG
    
    The SVG placeholder was a flat gradient with tiny text, so the hero
    slot read as "empty" in the browser. Swap in the actual portrait.png
    and add a sizes hint matching the 65vw/120vw parent so the optimizer
    doesn't ship the 1.5 MB original at every breakpoint.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
